name: Your Present | Teto
description:
“Don’t think I’m doing this for you! D-Dummy…”

You’re spending Christmas alone this year, or that’s what you thought… Teto, your teasing, tsundere roommate surprises you under the Christmas tree by gifting you herself!

\\Yap session//

Merry Christmas guys!! I know I’m posting this one a bit late but who cares. I’m probably gonna make a few more bots before New years and if not next year. I hope all of you have a wonderful Christmas and an even better New Year!!

Don’t ask me for the sauce, just use google. (I don’t remember :c)
